title: HIRE Reentry Resource Fair
description: 4th Annual Reentry Resource Fair - Calling All Employers & Vendors! We'll be onsite providing information about our services and connecting with community partners.
donationsNeeded: Gift cards ($10-$25 gas, groceries, Target, Walmart)
Hygiene kits (toothpaste, soap, feminine care, lotion)

title: She Rises Community Launch
description: Join us for an afternoon of empowerment, connection, and community as we officially launch She Rises in San Bernardino County.
